subtitle.defaultMessage: Starter codebase for AI products and full-stack B2B applications

featureSliceDescription.defaultMessage: A ready-to-study feature that flows through domain, use-cases, adapters, server-state, and UI.

featureSupabaseDescription.defaultMessage: Supabase auth, SSR-safe adapters, and a production-ready backend integration baseline.

featureGuardrailsDescription.defaultMessage: AGENTS, skills, MCP config, and import-boundary enforcement ship with the template.

featureTestingDescription.defaultMessage: Lint, typecheck, unit tests, and E2E smoke coverage are already wired into CI.
